_doc: Opportunity Engine config — keyless, honest, capital-aware. Drives /api/yields (real DeFi yield from DefiLlama public API), /api/spreads (cross-exchange + triangular arb from public exchange tickers), and the opportunity-scanner daemon. The engine RANKS + TRACKS; the operator SIGNS every deposit/trade. Nothing here moves money. Tuned for the $100 early-capital phase: prefer single-sided stablecoin lending on cheap chains (gas would eat a mainnet LP), prefer ORGANIC yield (real fees) over EMISSIONS (decay), demand persistence before trusting a number.

yields._max_apy_trust_doc: APY above this is almost always a mercenary-emissions trap or a depeg/liquidation risk — we still SHOW it but cap its trust score.
yields._chain_doc: For $100, an Ethereum-mainnet deposit can cost $5-20 in gas to enter+exit = a 5-20% haircut before any yield. Cheap-chain stablecoin lending is the capital-appropriate base. We DON'T hide Ethereum, we just score it down for this capital tier.
yields._safe_doc: Battle-tested lending/blue-chip protocols. Single-sided stable lending = no impermanent loss, withdraw anytime. The early-capital base layer.

spreads._fee_doc: Public taker fees in basis points (0.10% / 0.26% / 0.60%). Cross-exchange arb must clear BOTH legs' fees. We net them out and only flag net-positive. Most won't clear — that honest result IS the signal.
spreads._cross_doc: Cross-exchange arb realistically needs capital PRE-POSITIONED on both venues (you don't withdraw per-trade — chain confirmation is too slow). We flag the spread but mark it 'requires balances on both venues'. Triangular (single-venue, no transfer) is the realistic retail path.

triangular._doc: Single-venue triangular cycles expressed as currency triples. The engine resolves each hop to the real pair + side (buy=pay ask, sell=hit bid) from the live order book and walks the cycle product vs 1.0, both directions, minus 3 taker legs. Real if it clears — but HFT bots arb these in ms, so a clearing one on a slow REST poll is rare and almost always stale. Honest framing: a monitoring/teaching surface, not a money printer.

persistence._doc: Forward-is-backward for yield: a number you saw once is noise; a number that held for days is real. The scanner snapshots the top pools each pass; a pool's persistence = how many consecutive snapshots it stayed above its threshold. Trust scales with persistence.

honest: Real DeFi yield exists (stablecoin lending 4-12% organic is genuine), but it is SLOW compounding, not money from thin air. Cross-exchange arb is mostly eaten by fees+transfer latency; triangular arb is owned by sub-ms bots. This engine's real value: surface the few PERSISTENT, capital-appropriate, organic yields so the operator deploys the $100→$500 base safely — and prove (honestly) that the spread 'free money' is usually a mirage. The operator signs every transaction.
